title: Algerian Crumble Pie
description: A sweet and savory Algerian-inspired pie with a crumbly crust and a crumble topping.
instructions: Roll out algerian pastry dough into a circle.
Place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
In a bowl, mix together crumble mixture.
Spread crumble mixture evenly over the algerian pastry dough.
In a separate bowl, whisk together beaten eggs.
Pour egg mixture over crumble mixture.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until golden brown.
